# Notice

This repository is provided as an academic portfolio and research-code case study.

## Dataset and external resources

The repository does not include MedleyDB audio files, generated audio mixtures, cached MERT embeddings, model checkpoints, downloaded model weights or large experiment outputs.

To reproduce the experiments, users must obtain MedleyDB separately and place it outside the repository according to the paths described in the documentation. MERT checkpoints are downloaded through the relevant machine-learning libraries when the pipeline is executed.

## Generated files excluded from version control

The following files are intentionally excluded:

- raw audio and generated audio files;
- cached embeddings and feature arrays;
- trained model checkpoints and serialized models;
- experiment result folders;
- local Google Drive or Colab paths;
- downloaded third-party repositories and datasets.
